findings.text: NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email from Callum Abbot to Napier University accommodation residents, dated 09/03/2026, with an embedded .docx attachment named '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' (63 KB).
The extracted text does not contain the .docx binary. pdfdetach or Tika are required to extract the embedded file but are not available in the current harness.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Use pdfdetach or Apache Tika to extract the embedded file '2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx' from source NAP-SRC-0046 (PDF). Save the extracted .docx as a candidate artifact and then extract its text content.
proposed_tasks.title: Extract embedded .docx from NAP-SRC-0046 using pdfdetach or Tika

summary: Source NAP-SRC-0046 is a PDF email with an embedded .docx attachment (2026-27 RA Application Pack.docx). The extracted text confirms the attachment but does not contain the .docx binary. The task requires pdfdetach or Tika to extract the embedded file; these tools are not available in the current harness. A follow-up task is proposed to perform the extraction using a configured tool.

uncertainties.description: The embedded .docx file content is not available in the extracted text; it must be extracted using pdfdetach or Tika.
